title: Organic Rose Spray Black Spot Greenfly Whitefly Blackfly Aphids Scale Powdery Mildew 250ml
description: Directions Shake well before use. Spray directly onto rose leaves and stems, ensuring both sides are covered. Avoid application during bloom to prevent harming pollinators. Keep out of reach children pets. Store in a cool, dry place. Safety Warning Keep out of reach of children and pets. For outdoor use only. Do not apply to plants during bloom to avoid harming pollinators.
